content:
Apple remote desktop costs so much money. Anydesk, teamviewer etc have free tiers.

Do you guys ever need to access your machines remotely and what do you use (other than ssh)
I just use the built in screen sharing app. It only works from another Mac, but that’s all I need.
How do you connect to the other screen?

I don't know what apple calls it , You can setup VNC server on Mac. And access from anywhere,from your mobile too.

Or if you mean like using mouse, keyboard then i would prefer KDE connect.
